sentences.target: Je vais voir un spectacle ce soir.
sentences.reading: /ʒə vɛ vwaʁ œ̃ spɛk.takl sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: Je vais voir un spectacle ce soir.
translations.ipa: /ʒə vɛ vwaʁ œ̃ spɛk.takl sə swaʁ/
translations.en: I'm going to see a show tonight.
translations.es: Voy a ver un espectáculo esta noche.
translations.de: Ich gehe heute Abend zu einer Vorstellung.
translations.it: Vado a vedere uno spettacolo stasera.
translations.zh-Hans: 我今晚要去看一场演出。
translations.ru: Я сегодня вечером пойду на спектакль.
translations.pt: Vou ver um espetáculo hoje à noite.
translations.tr: Bu akşam bir gösteri izlemeye gidiyorum.
translations.vi: Tối nay tôi sẽ đi xem một buổi biểu diễn.
translations.nl: Vanavond ga ik naar een voorstelling.
translations.uk: Сьогодні ввечері я йду на виставу.
translations.hi: मैं आज रात एक शो देखने जा रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Σήμερα το βράδυ θα πάω να δω μια παράσταση.
translations.nb: I kveld skal jeg på en forestilling.
translations.id: Malam ini saya akan menonton pertunjukan.
translations.sv: I kväll ska jag gå på en föreställning.
translations.ro: Diseară merg să văd un spectacol.
translations.da: I aften skal jeg til en forestilling.
translations.ja: 今夜、ショーを見に行きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of the verb phrase.
Auxiliary 'aller' in present indicative (1st sg) forming the futur proche with the following infinitive 'voir'.
Infinitive verb; complement of 'aller' in a near-future construction, denoting the intended action.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'spectacle'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'voir'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'soir' to form the deictic time phrase.
Common noun, masculine; adverbial time complement ('ce soir').

sentences.target: Ce spectacle commence dans vingt minutes.

translations.fr: Ce spectacle commence dans vingt minutes.
translations.en: This show starts in twenty minutes.
translations.es: Este espectáculo empieza en veinte minutos.
translations.de: Diese Vorstellung beginnt in zwanzig Minuten.
translations.it: Questo spettacolo inizia tra venti minuti.
translations.zh-Hans: 这场演出二十分钟后开始。
translations.yue: 呢場表演二十分鐘後開始。
translations.ru: Это представление начнётся через двадцать минут.
translations.pt: Este espetáculo começa em vinte minutos.
translations.he: המופע הזה מתחיל בעוד עשרים דקות.
translations.tr: Bu gösteri yirmi dakika sonra başlıyor.
translations.vi: Buổi biểu diễn này bắt đầu sau hai mươi phút.
translations.ar: هذا العرض يبدأ بعد عشرين دقيقة.
translations.nl: Deze voorstelling begint over twintig minuten.
translations.uk: Ця вистава почнеться через двадцять хвилин.
translations.hu: Ez az előadás húsz perc múlva kezdődik.
translations.hi: यह शो बीस मिनट में शुरू होगा.
translations.pl: To przedstawienie zaczyna się za dwadzieścia minut.
translations.el: Αυτή η παράσταση ξεκινά σε είκοσι λεπτά.
translations.nb: Denne forestillingen begynner om tjue minutter.
translations.id: Pertunjukan ini mulai dalam dua puluh menit.
translations.sv: Den här föreställningen börjar om tjugo minuter.
translations.ro: Spectacolul acesta începe în douăzeci de minute.
translations.cs: Toto představení začíná za dvacet minut.
translations.da: Denne forestilling begynder om tyve minutter.
translations.fi: Tämä esitys alkaa kahdenkymmenen minuutin kuluttua.
translations.ja: このショーは20分後に始まります。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; specifies the noun 'spectacle'.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of 'commence'.
Main verb, present indicative (3rd person singular); predicates the start of the event.
Preposition introducing a temporal prepositional phrase.
Cardinal numeral modifying 'minutes'.
Common noun, feminine plural; object of the preposition 'dans' within the time complement.

translations.zh-Hans: 他们喜欢这场有趣的演出。
translations.yue: 佢哋鍾意呢場搞笑嘅表演。
translations.he: הם אוהבים את המופע המצחיק הזה.
translations.vi: Họ thích buổi biểu diễn vui nhộn này.
translations.nl: Ze vinden deze grappige voorstelling leuk.
translations.hu: Tetszik nekik ez a vicces előadás.
translations.hi: उन्हें यह मजेदार शो पसंद है.
translations.pl: Podoba im się ten zabawny spektakl.
translations.el: Τους αρέσει αυτή η αστεία παράσταση.
translations.sv: De gillar den här roliga föreställningen.
translations.da: De kan lide denne sjove forestilling.
translations.ja: 彼らはこの面白いショーが好きです。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person plural (default masculine); subject of 'aiment'.
Main verb, present indicative (3rd person plural); expresses preference for the object.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'spectacle'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'aiment'.
Attributive adjective, post-nominal; modifies 'spectacle' to add the quality 'funny'.

sentences.target: Tu cherches un spectacle en plein air.
sentences.reading: /ty ʃɛʁʃ œ̃ spɛk.takl ɑ̃ plɛ̃ ɛʁ/

translations.fr: Tu cherches un spectacle en plein air.
translations.ipa: /ty ʃɛʁʃ œ̃ spɛk.takl ɑ̃ plɛ̃ ɛʁ/
translations.en: You're looking for an outdoor show.
translations.es: Estás buscando un espectáculo al aire libre.
translations.de: Du suchst eine Vorstellung im Freien.
translations.ru: Ты ищешь шоу на открытом воздухе.
translations.pt: Você está procurando um espetáculo ao ar livre.
translations.vi: Bạn đang tìm một buổi biểu diễn ngoài trời.
translations.ar: أنت تبحث عن عرض في الهواء الطلق.
translations.hi: तुम खुले में होने वाला शो ढूंढ़ रहे हो.
translations.nb: Du ser etter en utendørs forestilling.
translations.id: Kamu sedang mencari pertunjukan luar ruangan.
translations.ro: Cauți un spectacol în aer liber.
translations.da: Du leder efter en udendørs forestilling.
translations.ja: あなたは野外のショーを探しています.

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of 'cherches'.
Main verb, present indicative (2nd person singular); takes a direct object.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'spectacle'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'cherches'.
Preposition introducing the locative expression 'en plein air'.
Adjective, masculine singular; part of the fixed expression 'en plein air' functioning adverbially ('in the open').
Common noun, masculine; complement within the prepositional phrase 'en plein air' indicating location outdoors.
